hero.tagline: Private dining, marine setting, boat arrival
hero.description: Reserve an overwater cabin, a seafood lunch, a sunset table or a group outing from Ghar El Melh.
hero.panelText: Book your table, cabin or group moment quickly and clearly.

notes.arrivalValue: Short boat transfer to the islet
notes.occasionValue: Private tables, group bookings and signature moments

about.title: A destination designed for considered days by the sea
about.description: Îlot Coco Beach brings together dining, private spaces and attentive service in a distinctive coastal setting.
about.story: From the first boarding moment to the last plate served, every detail should communicate calm, premium and memorable hospitality.

features.cabinsDesc: Cabins and lounges with direct sea views.
features.waterDesc: The short boat crossing immediately adds exclusivity to the experience.
features.hammocksDesc: Shaded lounge zones designed for longer stays.
features.vibesDesc: Wood, sand, light and marine textures translated into a more premium language.

gallery.title: A marine setting designed to impress before guests even arrive
gallery.subtitle: We kept the views that best highlight the venue, its textures and the quality of the experience.

video.title: Live the experience
video.description: A cinematic glimpse of the waterfront experience.

menu.title: Best-selling dishes to explore before you book
menu.subtitle: A visual preview of the starters, seafood, grills and signature plates served on-site.

notes.one: See the dishes guests ask for most at lunch, sunset service and larger group bookings.
notes.two: Every photo helps communicate the plate, the quality level and the expected spend before guests reserve.
notes.three: Need the full menu or a group package? The team shares it directly when you get in touch.

experience.title: Choose the setting that fits your occasion
experience.subtitle: From overwater cabins to panoramic terraces, each setting is featured for its clarity, view and guest capacity.

overwater.title: Overwater Cabin
overwater.desc: Private table above turquoise waters with hammock

swing.title: Ilot Swing
swing.desc: Our iconic wooden swing by the water's edge

hammock.title: Relaxation Area
hammock.desc: Colorful hammocks and bean bags between sand and pergolas

cabin.title: Private Cabin
cabin.desc: Covered pergola with table, cushions and curtains

reservation.title: Reserve a table, a private space or a group moment
reservation.subtitle: Share your preferred date, format and needs. The team confirms quickly via WhatsApp or phone.
reservation.formHint: A few details are enough to prepare a clear reply.
reservation.occasionsValue: Private lunches, groups, anniversaries, sunset tables and family days.
reservation.responseTime: WhatsApp, Messenger and Instagram are the fastest ways to reach the team, with phone support when needed.
reservation.submitHint: Your message will be prefilled and sent directly to the team through WhatsApp.
reservation.name: Your name
reservation.messagePlaceholder: Add any details about your request, the occasion or useful planning notes...

location.title: Easy to reach, memorable from the crossing itself
location.subtitle: The access section should reassure guests about arrival, travel time and overall simplicity.
location.howToDesc: From the parking area, a short boat transfer brings you directly to Îlot Coco Beach.

steps.oneDesc: Head to the parking area and designated boarding point.
steps.twoDesc: The short crossing is part of the experience and shapes the arrival.
steps.threeDesc: The team welcomes you and guides you to your reserved table or space.
